error.signature: upstream timed out (110: Connection timed out) while reading response header from upstream

verdict.summary: Backend server did not respond within proxy timeout. Slow API, long-running request, or backend down.

dead_ends.action: Set proxy_read_timeout to extremely large value (3600s)
dead_ends.why_fails: Masks backend performance problems; ties up nginx worker connections; may hit client-side timeouts anyway

dead_ends.action: Increase worker_connections to handle more concurrent requests
dead_ends.why_fails: worker_connections does not fix slow backends; it only helps with concurrent connection capacity

workarounds.action: Increase proxy timeouts to match expected backend response time
Fix the slow backend (add caching, optimize queries)
Add upstream health checks to avoid routing to dead backends
